description: Repository-scan retrieval hints for the currently formalized async_schema_propagation subpatterns. Use this file to build a candidate set before applying the verdict-layer subpattern JSON files.

defaults.group_match_semantics: For grep_keywords_all_groups, every group should match at least one keyword before the candidate is treated as high-priority.
defaults.any_match_semantics: grep_keywords_any is only for weak recall; false positives are acceptable at this layer and should be filtered later by manual review plus the verdict-layer subpattern JSON.
defaults.exclude_semantics: grep_keywords_exclude are soft down-rank hints by default unless the caller explicitly chooses hard exclusions. Prefer recall over precision unless a known noise class causes sibling confusion or unreviewable candidate explosion.
defaults.rg_template_semantics: Treat broad_recall as the default first hop for coarse repository scanning. Use fallback_no_path only when broad_recall is empty, implausibly sparse, or likely to miss due to helper/layout drift. Use group_intersection only as an optional lightweight shrinker after recall; it must never be treated as an absence proof or hard gate.
defaults.path_globs_semantics: path_globs are soft search-priority hints, not hard absence proofs. Because some anchors may live in helper .go files or non-test code, rerun fallback_no_path before concluding a subpattern is absent.

entries.subpattern_key: DDL 完成不等于 domain infoschema 已加载；断言前必须等 SchemaMetaVersion 推进
entries.pattern_file: DDL_完成不等于_domain_infoschema_已加载_断言前必须等_SchemaMetaVersion_推进.json
entries.first_pass_query_hint: 优先召回“把 DDL job state 当作 infoschema readiness 屏障”这类 patch：特征是测试在关键断言前显式等待 `dom.InfoSchema().SchemaMetaVersion()` 推进（> baseline），而不是只 sleep 或只看 job state。

rg_templates.name: broad_recall
rg_templates.intent: 第一跳用 SchemaMetaVersion 锚点粗召回（默认只扫 *_test.go）。

rg_templates.name: fallback_no_path
rg_templates.intent: 当锚点落在 helper/non-test file 或 broad_recall 过 sparse 时，去掉路径限制兜底。

rg_templates.name: group_intersection
rg_templates.intent: 第二跳把 SchemaMetaVersion 命中文件与 DDL/job/state 上下文做交集，帮助从通用版本读写里收束出更像测试稳定化的候选；它只是 shrinker，不是 absence proof。
rg_templates.command: rg -l -S -g '**/*_test.go' 'SchemaMetaVersion\(' <repo_root> | xargs rg -n -S -g '**/*_test.go' 'admin show ddl jobs|ddl jobs|SchemaState|waitFor\(|delete only|delete reorganization|public|infoschema loaded|ddl finish'

entries.subpattern_key: InfoSchema internal cache/TS 不能断言 sentinel；断言应基于 snapshot 或只校验不变量
entries.pattern_file: InfoSchema_internal_cache_TS_不能断言_sentinel_应基于_snapshot_或只校验不变量.json
entries.first_pass_query_hint: 优先召回“把 infoschema internal cache/TS 当成固定 sentinel”导致不稳的 patch：核心锚点是 `GetSnapshotInfoSchema(ts)` 或 `GetAndResetRecentInfoSchemaTS(...)`，修法往往是基于 snapshot 推导期望或只断言不变量。

rg_templates.name: broad_recall
rg_templates.intent: 第一跳按 snapshot infoschema / recent-ts reset 锚点粗召回。

rg_templates.name: fallback_no_path
rg_templates.intent: 去掉路径限制兜底（避免 helper/layout 漂移漏召回）。

entries.subpattern_key: SchemaOutOfDate/InfoSchemaChanged 的容错旋钮被测试调大（RetryTimes / max_delta_schema_count）
entries.first_pass_query_hint: 优先召回“通过扩大 out-of-date 重试窗口或 delta schema diff 容量来稳定测试”的 patch。注意：这是稳定但偏 workaround 的修法簇，候选命中后仍需人工确认其发生在测试 setup 而非生产默认值改动。

rg_templates.name: broad_recall
rg_templates.intent: 第一跳按 RetryTimes / max_delta_schema_count 锚点粗召回。

rg_templates.name: fallback_no_path
rg_templates.intent: 去掉路径限制兜底（避免 knob 设置落在 helper/non-test file）。

entries.subpattern_key: Domain.Reload() 作为 schema/cache 同步屏障：DDL/lock 状态变更后断言前必须 reload
entries.pattern_file: Domain_Reload_作为_schema_cache_同步屏障_DDL_lock_state_变更后断言前必须_reload.json
entries.first_pass_query_hint: 优先召回“测试侧把 dom.Reload 当作可见性/缓存释放同步屏障”的 patch。仅命中 Reload 不足以下结论；需要回到 patch-first 复核其是否作为 DDL/lock 状态切换后的因果屏障。

rg_templates.name: broad_recall
rg_templates.intent: 第一跳用 Reload 锚点粗召回（限制 *_test.go，避免生产代码噪音）。

rg_templates.name: fallback_no_path
rg_templates.intent: 去掉路径限制兜底（如果 helper/layout 漂移导致 broad_recall 漏召回）。

rg_templates.name: group_intersection
rg_templates.intent: 第二跳把 Reload 命中文件与 DDL/lock/state 上下文做交集以收束候选；它只是 shrinker，不是 absence proof。
rg_templates.command: rg -l -S -g '**/*_test.go' 'GetDomain\(.*\)\.Reload\(|\.Reload\(\)' <repo_root> | xargs rg -n -S -g '**/*_test.go' 'lock tables|unlock tables|admin show ddl jobs|SchemaState|OnJob|TestDDLCallback'
